microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing end-to-end workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, managing dependencies across Finance, Legal, and Engineering.
Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%.

Removed execution roadblocks across 6+ partner integrations by maintaining rigorous project-tracking frameworks, surfacing the right status information to senior stakeholders at the right time to keep programs on schedule.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running user demos and facilitation sessions that activated 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through structured onboarding programming.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation capabilities.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% across partner teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across Engineering and Operations.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and roadmapping automation for the highest-impact paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and make sound tradeoffs by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, delivering accurate records to stakeholders on a recurring cadence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and removing roadblocks across IT and Operations.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and build a stable, lightweight intake process that kept partnering teams informed.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and scaling the team's execution capacity.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing operations and owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process that removed manual workflow bottlenecks.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to expand community reach.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering structured findings that informed budget allocation decisions.

skills_priority: Program Management: end-to-end event & program delivery, cross-functional execution, stakeholder alignment, dependency mapping, roadmapping
Operations: vendor management, budget allocation, process standardization, workflow automation, project tracking
Facilitation & Community: onboarding facilitation, people experience programming, lightweight communication frameworks, Agile/Scrum
Tools: Power BI, Azure, CI/CD, AI agents, semantic search, Python, SQL
AI / Automation: workflow automation, LLM-powered tools, process optimization, prompt engineering
tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end delivery' (JD: 'end-to-end delivery of internal events') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 and pro_painters bullet#1 to mirror Palantir's core ownership language.
'facilitation' and 'onboarding programming' (JD: 'facilitation of new hire and intern onboarding') surfaced in microsoft_2023 bullet#1 to signal direct readiness for that responsibility.

'removing roadblocks' and 'surfacing the right information to the right stakeholders at the right time' (JD verbatim) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and microsoft_2022 bullet#3 to reflect the operational backbone framing.

'community reach' and 'people experience programming' (JD: 'build genuine community and connection across our people') woven into pro_painters bullet#2 and skills section to align with Palantir's culture mandate.

'sound tradeoffs' and 'lightweight communication frameworks' (JD: 'make sound tradeoffs', 'lightweight frameworks') referenced in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 and skills section to mirror Palantir's project management values.
